---
title: "Acasă"
subtitle: "Nichita Stănescu"
author: "Doctor Shrink"
date: "2026-06-23"
categories: [poezie, spoken-word, casa]
image: "../images/tds-logo-150px.png"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## ▶️ Ascultă

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/md1dOrk0Y2w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 📜 Versuri {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics}
Acasa mea e intr-un cavant<br>
<br>
gandit de altul.<br>
<br>
Acasa mea e intr-un sarut<br>
<br>
pe care l-am gandit<br>
<br>
in alti doi adolescenti.<br>
<br>
Acasa mea este inlauntrul<br>
<br>
sagetii trase inspre zeu de geti.<br>
<br>
Acasa mea e gandul ce-l gandesti<br>
<br>
spre mine.<br>
<br>
Acasa mea e numele ce-l am<br>
<br>
si mi-l rostesti.<br>
<br>
Acasa mea e un cuvant,<br>
<br>
un prieten si o curva.<br>
<br>
Fugind din timpul care trece,<br>
<br>
ah, timp, bordel al vietii mele!
:::

## 🖋️ Despre {.unnumbered}

* **Poet:** Nichita Stănescu
* **Temă:** casa
* **Interpretare:** Doctor Shrink — recitare spoken-word, fundal ambiental
